dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.add_first: Add your first server to start monitoring
dashboard.confirm_delete_folder: Delete folder? Servers will be moved out of it.

servers.title: Servers
servers.subtitle: Manage your monitored servers
servers.server_host_hint: IP address or domain name of the server. Default port: 9100
servers.installer_token_subtitle: One token for all nodes — copy once and reuse.
servers.migration_banner_subtitle: Migrate them to the shared installer token in one click.
servers.migration_manual_hint: These legacy nodes can't be migrated remotely. Reinstall them with the shared token via mon → Install Node, then click «I reinstalled them».

infra.title: Infrastructure
infra.empty: No accounts. Create the first one.

notes.title: Notes
notes.placeholder: Shared notepad — changes sync in real-time

server_details.confirm_reboot: Are you sure you want to reboot this server?
server_details.confirm_shutdown: Are you sure you want to shut down this server? You will need physical access or IPMI to turn it back on.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your dashboard preferences
settings.auto_refresh_desc: How often to update server metrics
settings.traffic_period_desc: Time period for traffic statistics on dashboard
settings.storage_notice: Settings are saved automatically and synced across sessions.
settings.ssl_renewing_desc: This may take a minute. nginx will be restarted.
settings.ssl_not_due: Certificate is not due for renewal (more than 30 days remaining).
settings.ssl_nginx_restarting_desc: Waiting for server to come back online. This is expected.
settings.ssl_connection_timeout: Connection timed out. Please check server status and refresh the page.
settings.ssl_timeout: Renewal timed out. Check server logs.
settings.backup_upload_hint: Drag and drop or click to select
settings.backup_confirm_restore: All current data will be replaced with backup data. Continue?
settings.backup_restore_success: Data restored successfully. It is recommended to restart the panel.
settings.backup_restart_hint: After restoring, it is recommended to restart: docker compose restart
settings.backup_busy: An operation is already in progress
settings.speedtest_method_auto_hint: Ookla outside RU, iperf3 in RU
settings.speedtest_panel_address_hint: IP or domain that nodes use to connect to panel
settings.speedtest_servers_desc: List of public servers for testing
settings.speedtest_notify_slow: Notify when speed is below threshold
settings.time_sync_desc: Server timezone and NTP sync across all servers

server_card.load_avg_tooltip:
Load Average (1 / 5 / 15 min)
Avg processes in CPU queue.
{{cores}} cores: norm up to {{cores}}.0
0-70% normal · 70-100% high · >100% overloaded

firewall.title: Firewall Rules (UFW)
firewall.from_hint: Leave empty to allow all IPs
firewall.confirm_disable: Are you sure you want to disable the firewall? This will expose all ports.

haproxy.title: Server Settings
haproxy.confirm_stop: Are you sure you want to stop HAProxy?
haproxy.ssl_note: Note: The server must be accessible on port 80 from the internet for domain validation.
haproxy.apply_default_template_hint: Replace global/defaults with standard template, preserving rules

optimization.title: System Optimization
optimization.confirm_apply: Apply system optimizations? This will configure TCP/network settings, file descriptors limits, and enable BBR congestion control.
optimization.bbr_info: Enables BBR congestion control and optimizes TCP settings for high-performance VPN/proxy connections.
optimization.docker_warning_text: System optimizations (sysctl, limits.conf, systemd) must be applied on the host machine, not inside the container. Run commands manually on the server or use the deploy.sh script.

optimizations.title: System Optimizations
optimizations.confirm_apply: Apply default system optimizations? This will configure BBR, TCP/network settings, and file descriptors limits.

traffic.title: Traffic Statistics
traffic.udp_info: UDP is connectionless — shows open sockets waiting for datagrams
traffic.add_port_hint: Add a port to start tracking its traffic

updates.title: Updates
updates.subtitle: Manage panel and nodes versions
updates.warning_text: During the update, services will be temporarily unavailable. Panel update will disconnect your session.
updates.all_up_to_date: All components are up to date
updates.all_up_to_date_desc: Panel and all nodes are running the latest versions. No updates required.
updates.duration_text: Updates may take 5-10 minutes to complete. Do not close the page and wait for the process to finish.

sys_opt.title: Optimizations
sys_opt.subtitle: Manage kernel, network, and NIC tuning across nodes
sys_opt.remove_confirm: Remove all system optimizations from this node? This will revert sysctl, limits, and network tuning settings.
sys_opt.hybrid_desc: Hardware multi-queue + RPS on remaining cores
sys_opt.mq_available_hint: Server supports hardware multiqueue, can be switched
sys_opt.profile_panel_desc: Panels, bots, monitoring, websites and other services
sys_opt.info_text: Optimizations are applied to the host machine via nsenter. When switching NIC mode, the previous mode is automatically removed.

bulk_actions.title: Bulk Actions
bulk_actions.subtitle: Manage rules on multiple servers
bulk_actions.start_haproxy_hint: HAProxy will be started on all selected servers
bulk_actions.stop_haproxy_hint: HAProxy will be stopped on all selected servers. All active connections will be closed.
bulk_actions.restart_haproxy_hint: If HAProxy is running — it will be restarted. If stopped — it will be started.
bulk_actions.delete_haproxy_hint: Rule will be found by listen port, target IP and port
bulk_actions.delete_traffic_hint: Enter port to remove from tracking
bulk_actions.delete_firewall_hint: All rules for the specified port will be deleted
bulk_actions.terminal_hint: Command will be executed on all selected servers in parallel
bulk_actions.terminal_script_hint: Script will be executed on all selected servers in parallel
bulk_actions.haproxy_config_hint: Full HAProxy config will be replaced on all selected servers
bulk_actions.find_replace_hint: Search and replace text in HAProxy configs on all selected servers. For example, replace a domain with an IP.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.empty_hint: Enter a command and press Enter or click Execute

blocklist.title: IP/CIDR Blocklist
blocklist.subtitle: Manage incoming and outgoing traffic blocking via ipset
blocklist.add_global_desc: IP/CIDR will be blocked on all servers
blocklist.ip_placeholder:
Enter IP or CIDR (one per line)
192.168.1.1
10.0.0.0/8
blocklist.temp_timeout_desc: Time in seconds for temporary list (default 600)

remnawave.title: Remnawave
remnawave.subtitle: User activity monitoring
remnawave.confirmClear: Are you sure? All statistics data will be deleted.
remnawave.useCustomBotHint: If disabled, uses the bot from Alerts settings
remnawave.onlineOnlyHint: Only currently connected users are shown
remnawave.trafficThresholdHint: Exceeding this in 30 min counts as one trigger
remnawave.trafficConfirmCountHint: How many consecutive cycles before notification

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Server monitoring notifications via Telegram
alerts.excluded_servers_hint: Servers in this list will not be monitored by the alerting system

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Track server and project payments
billing.no_items: No items. Add a server or project to start tracking.
billing.paid_until_hint: Paste the date from your hosting in any format
billing.notification_hint: Expiration notifications via Telegram from Alerts section
billing.telegram_from_alerts: Telegram bot and chat are taken from Alerts section settings
billing.confirm_delete_folder: Delete folder? Items will be moved out of it.
billing.yc_oauth_token_hint: Click the link, grant access, copy the token →
billing.yc_threshold_hint: Negative balance limit at which resources are suspended (e.g. -1000)

ssh_security.title: SSH Security
ssh_security.subtitle: Protect servers from unauthorized SSH access
ssh_security.preset_recommended_desc: Balanced security: non-standard port, attempt limits, fail2ban
ssh_security.preset_maximum_desc: Key-only access, aggressive blocking, minimal sessions
ssh_security.port_desc: Changing from default 22 reduces automated attacks
ssh_security.permit_root_desc: Recommended to disable direct root access
ssh_security.password_auth_desc: Disable if SSH keys are configured for maximum security
ssh_security.pubkey_auth_desc: SSH keys are more secure than passwords, recommended
ssh_security.allow_users_desc: Only listed users can log in (space-separated)
ssh_security.x11_forwarding_desc: Disable if you don't use graphical applications
ssh_security.client_alive_interval_desc: How often to check if client is still connected (0 — disabled)
ssh_security.f2b_not_installed: fail2ban is not installed. It will be installed automatically when enabled.
ssh_security.f2b_max_retry_desc: Failed login attempts before IP is banned
ssh_security.f2b_ban_time_desc: How long an IP is banned after exceeding attempts
ssh_security.f2b_find_time_desc: Time period for counting failed attempts
ssh_security.keys_warning_no_keys: Warning: no SSH keys found. Disabling password login will lock you out!
ssh_security.node_unsupported: Node does not support SSH management
ssh_security.node_unsupported_desc: Update the node to the latest version. SSH management will become available after the update.
ssh_security.password_weak: Weak: needs letters, digits and special characters

wildcard_ssl.title: Wildcard SSL
wildcard_ssl.domain_hint: Enter root domain (e.g. nexyonn.com). Certificate will cover *.nexyonn.com and nexyonn.com
wildcard_ssl.cf_token_hint: Cloudflare → My Profile → API Tokens → Create Token. Needs DNS:Edit permission for your domain zone
wildcard_ssl.email_hint: Let's Encrypt will notify you if the certificate is about to expire
wildcard_ssl.auto_renew_hint: Panel will automatically renew and deploy the certificate to all servers
wildcard_ssl.deploy_path_hint: Parent folder. A subfolder with the domain name will be created inside
wildcard_ssl.reload_cmd_empty_hint: Can be left empty — files will be copied without restarting the service
wildcard_ssl.reload_cmd_hint: Runs after copying. On failure — files are rolled back from backup
wildcard_ssl.fullchain_filename_hint: Certificate filename inside the folder. Default: fullchain.pem
wildcard_ssl.privkey_filename_hint: Private key filename inside the folder. Default: privkey.pem
wildcard_ssl.custom_path_hint: Set absolute paths for certificate and key; no domain subfolder will be created
wildcard_ssl.servers_hint: Enable a server, set the folder and command — the certificate will be copied automatically
wildcard_ssl.deploy_all_hint: Copies fullchain.pem + privkey.pem to all enabled servers and runs the reload command
wildcard_ssl.renew_hint: Force renew the certificate via Let's Encrypt + Cloudflare DNS
wildcard_ssl.issue_prereq: Configure the Cloudflare API Token below before issuing

haproxy_configs.title: HAProxy Configs
haproxy_configs.subtitle: Centralized config profiles for HAProxy nodes
haproxy_configs.no_profiles_hint: Create a profile and link servers to manage configs centrally
haproxy_configs.no_servers: No servers linked to this profile
haproxy_configs.no_rules: No rules yet. Add a rule to generate config.
haproxy_configs.raw_config_warning: Manual edits to the config may break rule parsing. Use the GUI above when possible.
haproxy_configs.default_config_hint: A default HAProxy template will be generated automatically
haproxy_configs.template_applied: Template applied to current rules. Click Save to apply.

balancer.backup_hint: Only used when all primary servers are down
balancer.slowstart_hint: Time to reach full load after recovery
balancer.redispatch_hint: Retry on a different server on failure
balancer.allbackups_hint: Use all backup servers, not just one

alg.leastconn_hint: Sends to the server with the fewest active connections. Best for long sessions
alg.roundrobin_hint: Distributes requests evenly across servers, weighted by server weight
alg.source_hint: Hashes client IP to always reach the same server. Simple session persistence
alg.first_hint: Uses the first server with available connection slots. Fills servers sequentially

torrent_blocker.title: Torrent Blocker
torrent_blocker.subtitle: Automatically ban IPs from Remnawave torrent blocker reports
torrent_blocker.excluded_servers_hint: Monitoring servers that will not receive bans
torrent_blocker.truncate_confirm: Clear all torrent blocker reports on Remnawave?
torrent_blocker.remnawave_not_configured: Remnawave API is not configured. Set it up in Remnawave settings first.

faq.title: Help
faq.not_found: Help article for this section is not available yet.
